items.q: How do you say 'I get on well with my sister'?
items.correct: Je m'entends bien avec ma sœur
items.misconception: Je entends bien avec ma sœur
items.random_wrong: Je suis bien avec ma sœur
items.why: Students forget the reflexive pronoun; 's'entendre avec' needs 'me' and 'avec'.

items.q: How should the adjective agree in 'ma mère est ___ (kind)'?
items.why: Students forget feminine agreement; 'gentil' becomes 'gentille' for a feminine subject.
Students confuse family words; 'parents' here means mother and father.
It's A hobby. “A relative” is the classic near-miss here; knowing why it's wrong is worth as much as knowing the right answer.
